summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that JPM is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $298.4. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 23.1%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $321.18 and a significant trendline confluence around $315.26 (formed by 2 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
